alternatives: Include target naming such as IO in public BoardID values
Use one generic lifecycle rule for every Board type
consequences: Board identity remains stable across target naming changes
Common and type-specific lifecycle obligations remain distinct
Re-activation and concurrent task routing have explicit safety boundaries
context: Board IDs are cross-module contracts, while UI, viewless, flow, and block-task Boards have materially different lifecycle mechanics.
decision: Use pub.mod.<Module>.<Board> public identities and apply common, viewless, and BlockTask lifecycle obligations through separate canonical Rules.
migration: Rename nonconforming IDs, classify each Board type, remove duplicate completion paths, and adopt the matching type-specific lifecycle contract.
title: Board identity, ownership, and lifecycle
verification_impact: The final joined AI consistency review confirms public IDs and common, viewless, and BlockTask lifecycle guidance agree across Canon and specs.
